title: Ondo Finance Debuts SEC-Aligned Tokenized Stock Model With BlackRock ETF, Micron Shares
summary: Ondo Finance has introduced a new tokenized stock model that aligns with SEC guidelines, featuring tokenized shares of a BlackRock ETF and Micron. The framework is underpinned by Broadridge and transfer agent Oasis Pro, keeping tokenized securities within existing U.S. market rules based on the SEC's third-party custodial model.
body:
Ondo Finance has launched a new framework for tokenized stocks that aligns with U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) guidelines. This model, supported by Broadridge and transfer agent Oasis Pro, allows tokenized securities to operate within existing market rules.

The platform now offers tokenized versions of a BlackRock ETF and Micron shares. This approach is based on the SEC's third-party custodial model, ensuring that the tokenized assets remain compliant with U.S. securities laws. Ondo Finance's model aims to bridge traditional finance with blockchain technology while maintaining regulatory compliance.

This development is significant for everyday investors as it provides a regulated way to access tokenized stocks. It offers the benefits of blockchain technology, such as increased liquidity and fractional ownership, while ensuring that investments remain within the legal framework. This could attract more traditional investors to the crypto space, as it provides a familiar and secure way to engage with tokenized assets.

Investors interested in this new model should watch for further announcements from Ondo Finance regarding additional tokenized assets and regulatory developments. As the market evolves, more traditional financial instruments may become tokenized, offering new opportunities for investors.

The model uses the SEC's third-party custodial model to keep tokenized securities compliant with U.S. market rules. No regulatory gray areas here.

If you're looking for a secure way to invest in tokenized stocks, this could be a game-changer. Watch for more SEC-aligned offerings from Ondo Finance. Read more → https://cryptocatalyst.news/articles/2026-07-02-ondo-finance-launches-sec-approved-tokenized-stocks-with-blackrock-micron
